---
title: "function"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# function

```{julia}
@doc + # return the doc of a function
```

```{julia}
methods(+) # return the methods this function have 
```

```{julia}
@which +(1, 1) # find the specific methods used in this call.
```

```{julia}
@code_warntype +(1, 1) # 会显示 Julia 编译器推断出来的类型; Body is the return type
```
